item.text: I’ll take the tempo line: play Blast for damage, then push the board into the middle so P1 contests multiple centers and starts damaging P2’s forward raider.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-003.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-003\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-003.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-003.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-003.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-003\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":3}},{\"unit\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":2},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":9,\"row\":2},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":4}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"deckDamage\":2},{\"attacker\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-003.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-003.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-003.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-003.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-003.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Blast, pushed hard into the central centers, and focused fire on P2'"'s forward raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: use Blast for immediate damage, prioritize center occupation over deck smoothing, and concentrate attacks on the closest P2 pressure piece to improve P1's board tempo.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-003.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-003.board.result.json"'

turn-003: P1-marksman-start-4 movement uses an invalid map path 9,2 -> 8,4

item.text: The marksman path was illegal, so I’m adjusting only the board file. I’m keeping the rush intent: central occupation plus a raider hit on P2’s forward raider with Blast damage attached.

item.text: The second rejection shows that diagonal push exceeded the raider’s movement budget. I’m shortening the attack line and using the scout to apply Blast damage while keeping the raiders on valid central pressure routes.

item.text: The board engine rejected attaching 2 deck damage to one attack under the damage-cap rules. I’m retrying with capped deck damage on the same pressure attack.

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-003`.

Deck line: played `blast`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `4` money and `2` damage.

Board line: moved raider to `(5,3)`, scout to `(6,5)`, raider to `(7,5)`, marksman to `(8,3)`. Scout attacked `P2-raider-start-1` for `3` total damage using `1` capped deck damage.

Rationale: this keeps the rush posture: central occupation, forward pressure, and immediate damage into P2’s closest threat. Strict validation passed.
